title: Win11Forge Plugin Settings
description: Schema for the Win11Forge plugin system configuration

enabled.description: Whether the plugin system is globally enabled

autoLoad.description: Automatically load plugins from the Plugins directory on startup

allowedHooks.description: List of lifecycle hooks that plugins are permitted to register

disabledPlugins.description: List of plugin names to exclude from loading

pluginTimeout.description: Maximum execution time per plugin hook invocation in seconds

sandboxing.description: Plugin sandboxing configuration for isolation and security

enabled.description: Whether plugin sandboxing with AST validation and job isolation is enabled

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the sandboxing configuration

trustedPublishers.description: List of trusted plugin publisher identifiers that bypass extra validation

pluginRegistry.description: Online plugin registry configuration for discovering and installing plugins

enabled.description: Whether the online plugin registry is enabled

url.description: URL of the plugin registry (null when not configured)

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the registry configuration
